pages.text: $(o)"Skip the crystals. Go direct."$()$(br2)Place a $(l)Mana Condenser$() adjacent to a Mana Well, and the well stops dropping crystals �?every produced unit flows directly into the condenser's 256 CM buffer.

pages.title: Output Adapter
pages.text: The condenser exposes $(l)IManaHandler$() so reservoirs / spreaders / docks can pull from it transparently.$(br2)Mana Wells $(l)never receive$() back from the condenser �?safe to chain.$(br2)Internal flow: 8 CM/tick to neighbors.

pages.title: Well Upgrade Table
pages.text: Place these blocks $(l)under or around$() the Mana Well to boost extraction:$(br2)$(l)Below$():$(br)· magic_crystal_block: $(a)+25%$()$(br)· concentrated_crystal_block: $(a)+60%$()$(br)· ancient_crystal: $(a)+100%$()

pages.title: Horizontal Boosters
pages.text: Up to 4 of each type, accumulating:$(br2)· magic_crystal_block: $(a)+10%$() each (max +40%)$(br)· concentrated_crystal_block: $(a)+20%$() each (max +80%)$(br2)$(c)Hard cap: 3.0× base rate.$()$(br)A maxed setup tops out at the design's $(l)9 mana/min$() ceiling.

pages.title: Optimal Layout
pages.text: Build $(l)$()below: $(l)ancient_crystal$() $(o)(+100%)$()$(br)NSEW: 4× $(l)concentrated_crystal_block$() $(o)(+80%)$()$(br)Adjacent: $(l)mana_condenser$() �?reservoir$(br2)Result: 1.8× capped to 3.0×, $(l)$()fully networked, no item entities cluttering the world.
